channel.title: KIC on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in KIC on Tech Blog

item.title: [Home Lab] Exploring Kong Ingress Controller (KIC)
item.description: Wishing everyone a Happy New Year 2024! In this post, I shift focus from my previous discussion on Kong Gateway to delve into the setup of the Kong Ingress Controller (KIC). Keeping it concise and celebratory for the New Year! Preparation Helm serves as a Kubernetes package manager. To install it, execute the following command: sudo snap install helm --classic Depending on your configuration, from my K3s master node, I set up my kubeconfig with:
